sections.paragraph:
στενοχωρία, ας, ἡ (s. prec. entry; in the lit. sense, ‘narrowness’, Thu. et al.) fig. a set of stressful circumstances, distress, difficulty, anguish, trouble (Polyb. 1, 67, 1; Petosiris, Fgm. 7 ln. 22 [w. πόλεμος]; Plut., Mor. 182b; Artem. 3, 14; Aelian, VH 2, 41; Cass. Dio 39, 34; PCairZen 435, 2 [III b.c.]; Cat. Cod. Astr. VII 169, 21; Sir 10:26; 1 Macc 2:53; 3 Macc 2:10; En 98:10; TestAbr B 7 p. 111, 21 [Stone p. 70]) w. θλῖψις (Artem. 1, 68; 82; 2, 3 al.; Dt 28:53; 55; 57; Is 8:22; 30:6; Esth 1:1g; PLond V, 1677, 11 [VI a.d.]. Cp. Epict. 1, 25, 26 στενοχωρία … θλίβειν) Ro 2:9; 8:35. W. λύπη Hv 4, 3, 4; m 10, 2, 6. Pl. difficulties (oft. Artem.; 1 Macc 13:3; Cat. Cod. Astr. VIII/1 p. 165, 2) 2 Cor 6:4; 12:10.—DELG s.v. στενός. TW.

prec. prec. = preceding

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

Thu Thu , V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

Petosiris Petosiris = astrolog. writings attributed to P. and N.: collection of fragments; before II b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

  1. ln. = line

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Artem Artem , onir., II a.d.—List 5

Aelian Aelian , II a.d.—List 5

PCairZen PCairZen = Zenon Papyri, Catalogue général . . . du Musée du Caire—List 4

En En = I Enoch—List 2

TestAbr TestAbr = Testament of Abraham, with some interpolations; I b.c./I a.d.—Lists 2, 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

PLond PLond = PLondon=Greek Papyri in the British Museum—List 4

Epict Epict , various works, I–II a.d.—List 5

Hv Hv = Visions

m m = Mandates

oft. oft. = often

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 943
